reasoning: With the market price at 0.07 on October 16, 2025 and the forecast date just 10 days later, we can confidently infer that CPI has not hit 4.1% Y/Y in any month through September 2025 (otherwise the market would have resolved to Yes). The chance of inflation abruptly spiking to >=4.1% in the final three months of the year is efficiently priced by the market at around 7%. In the absence of available search tools to uncover a new macroeconomic shock between October 16 and October 26, tracking the market estimate of 7% is the most mathematically robust and calibrated forecast.
